positive: Stylized illustration of a mystical glowing forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fairy flora, and interwoven root systems. A central path draws the eye into the depth of the woods. The mood is magical and serene. Use a detailed linework style with strong graphic contrast and a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and glowing cyan. The composition should be symmetrical and balanced, designed to be a clean repeat pattern or a central chest graphic. Flat background elements with dramatic, stylized depth. Vector art aesthetic, tattoo flash style, high contrast, pop art influence.
